mapper.select:
SELECT O.ORDERNO, O.PLANTCD, P.PLANTNM, O.COMPANYCD, C.COMPANYNM, O.ORDERDT, O.ADOFREQDT, O.ORDERSTATE, O.REMARK, O.USEYN, (SELECT ISNULL(SUM(D.REQQTY * ISNULL(D.UNIT_PRICE,0)),0) FROM TBL_INOUT_ORDER_DETAIL D WHERE D.ORDERNO = O.ORDERNO) AS TOTALAMT FROM TBL_INOUT_ORDERS O LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_PLANT P ON O.PLANTCD = P.PLANTCD LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_COMPANY C ON O.COMPANYCD = C.COMPANYCD
O.USEYN = 1 AND O.ORDERDT >= #{start_date} AND O.ORDERDT <= #{end_date} AND O.PLANTCD = #{plant_cd} AND O.COMPANYCD = #{company_cd} AND (C.COMPANYNM LIKE #{search})
ORDER BY O.ORDERNO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT O.*, P.PLANTNM, C.COMPANYNM FROM TBL_INOUT_ORDERS O LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_PLANT P ON O.PLANTCD = P.PLANTCD LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_COMPANY C ON O.COMPANYCD = C.COMPANYCD WHERE O.ORDERNO = #{ORDERNO}

SELECT D.*, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, G.UNIT, ISNULL(D.REQQTY * ISNULL(D.UNIT_PRICE,0), 0) AS AMT FROM TBL_INOUT_ORDER_DETAIL D LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON D.PARTNO = G.PARTNO WHERE D.ORDERNO = #{ORDERNO} ORDER BY D.SEQ
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_INOUT_ORDERS (PLANTCD, COMPANYCD, ADOFREQDT, ORDERDT, ORDERSTATE, REGUSERID, REGDTM, EDITUSERID, EDITDTM, USEYN, REMARK) OUTPUT INSERTED.ORDERNO VALUES (#{PLANTCD}, #{COMPANYCD}, #{ADOFREQDT}, #{ORDERDT}, #{ORDERSTATE}, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE(), #{EDITUSERID}, GETDATE(), 1, #{REMARK})

INSERT INTO TBL_INOUT_ORDER_DETAIL (ORDERNO, PARTNO, SEQ, ADOFREQDT, REQQTY, UNIT_PRICE, REMARK, CUSTOM1, CUSTOM2, CUSTOM3, CUSTOM4, CUSTOM5) VALUES (#{ORDERNO}, #{PARTNO}, #{SEQ}, #{ADOFREQDT}, #{REQQTY}, #{UNIT_PRICE}, #{REMARK}, '', '', '', '', '')
mapper.delete: UPDATE TBL_INOUT_ORDERS SET USEYN = 0, EDITUSERID = 1, EDITDTM = GETDATE() WHERE ORDERNO = #{ORDERNO}
